scripts.check: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && turbo build typecheck lint && vitest run --coverage && knip && syncpack lint && api-extractor run -c packages/aai/api-extractor.json && api-extractor run -c packages/aai-ui/api-extractor.json && tsc -p packages/aai-cli/tsconfig.templates.json && markdownlint-cli2 '**/*.md' '#**/node_modules' '#.aai' && attw --pack --profile esm-only packages/aai && attw --pack packages/aai-ui --profile esm-only --entrypoints . ./session ./components && pnpm --filter @alexkroman1/aai-server test:integration && pnpm --filter @alexkroman1/aai-cli test:e2e
